Title: VPN keeps disconnecting
Content: My VPN connection drops every 10-15 minutes while working from home, forcing me to reconnect constantly.
Author: Aisha Rahman

Title: Cannot login to email
Content: I am locked out of my Outlook account after entering the wrong password too many times.
Author: Marcus Tan

Title: Laptop won't turn on
Content: My company laptop screen stays black even after holding the power button. No lights or fan noise.
Author: Siti Noraini

Title: ERP system showing error on invoice page
Content: Every time I try to generate an invoice in the ERP system, I get a 'Database Timeout' error.
Author: Rajesh Kumar

Title: Request to reset MFA device
Content: I lost my phone and need my multi-factor authentication device reset so I can log back into company systems.
Author: Wong Mei Ling
